g.text: Immich storage migration: WD pool to Toshiba pool (2026-05-28)

The database backup, encoded-video purge (1.9 TB down to 825 GB), and `pct move-volume 110 mp0 hddpool-1` (886 GB across 32k files) all run with Immich stopped. The old WD subvolume stays mounted until the timeline, faces, photos, and videos verify on hddpool-1, then it's destroyed.
